name: Graham Holdings Co
business: Graham Holdings Company is a diversified holding company with operations in educational services (Kaplan), television broadcasting, healthcare (in-home infusion, home health/hospice, etc.), manufacturing (wood treatment, electrical solutions, lifting systems, combustion controls), automotive dealerships, and other businesses including restaurants, custom framing, online art marketplace, marketing, and media. Its services target students, institutions, businesses, patients, consumers, and advertisers.

exposures.sentence: Through Kaplan, Inc., the Company provides a wide variety of educational services to students, schools, colleges, universities and businesses.
The Company's television broadcasting segment owns and operates seven television broadcast stations and provides social media management tools designed to connect newsrooms with their users.

The healthcare group provides home health infusions through its CSI Pharmacy Holding Company, LLC (CSI) segment and other healthcare services, including home health, hospice and palliative care; software-as-a-service technology; physician services for allergy, asthma and immunology patients; in-home aesthetics; and applied behavior analysis therapy.
Forney Corporation is a global supplier of burners, igniters, dampers, and controls for combustion processes in electric utility and industrial applications.
Hoover Treated Wood Products, Inc. is a multi-product supplier to the commercial building industry.
Joyce/Dayton Corp. is a leading manufacturer of screw jacks, linear actuators and related linear motion products and lifting systems in North America.

Group Dekko Inc. is an electrical solutions company that focuses on innovative power charging and data systems; industrial and commercial indoor lighting solutions; and the manufacture of electrical components and assemblies for medical equipment, transportation, industrial and appliance products.
Decile LLC is an AI-powered ecommerce analytics platform that helps marketers extract value from their proprietary first-party customer, product and sales data.
Supporting Cast LLC provides a software-as-a-service platform that enables podcasters and media companies to monetize premium audio content through paid subscriptions, memberships, and audiobooks.
Social News Desk, a provider of social media management tools for news, government, education, and enterprise sectors.
Society6 is an online art and design marketplace where a curated community of artists and designers can market and sell their original art and designs printed on a wide variety of products.
Framebridge, Inc. provides high-quality, affordable and fast custom framing directly to consumers.
Code3 LLC is a marketing and insights company that manages digital advertising for global and mid-market brands and early-stage companies.
As of December 31, 2025, GMG is broadcasting in the ATSC 3.0 standard on all of its stations.

catalysts.event: Opening of Ebbitt House restaurant in Washington, D.C.
catalysts.sentence: CRG has another restaurant under construction, Ebbitt House, with the planned opening in 2026.

catalysts.event: Opening of Clyde's at Dulles International Airport under licensing agreement
catalysts.sentence: Additionally, a Clyde's will open in Dulles International Airport under a licensing agreement in 2026.

catalysts.event: Opening of a new Clyde's restaurant in Reston, VA
catalysts.sentence: CRG plans to open a new restaurant in Reston, VA in the second quarter of 2026
